---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Sentinel
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

What you would like Sentinel to do.

## Use case

The problem this solves and who it helps (an org auditing many repos, a pack
author, a maintainer triaging findings, …).

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working — CLI flag, `sentinel.yaml` field, workflow change,
rule-pack format addition, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Alignment with the values

How this fits Sentinel's posture (local-first, privacy-respecting, open for all)
— e.g. does it keep the default local, avoid new hosted dependencies, keep rule
packs owned by the installing organisation?
